case_title: CITI PROPERTIES I, LLC VS. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-30-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
